description: Integer canonicalization cases for RFC 8785. Most implementations trivially agree on integers; these cases guard against regressions in bignum handling and sign representation.

cases.name: negative one
cases.rationale: negative sign must be preserved, no leading-zero variants

cases.name: max safe integer
cases.rationale: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER in JavaScript; ensures no precision loss at the JS integer boundary

cases.name: int32 max
cases.rationale: int32 max; Go int default on 32-bit platforms

cases.name: ten
cases.rationale: no leading zeros, no trailing decimals
